docs.text: WebSocket API
docs.title: Boggle Server Documentation

docs.text: Boggle Server WebSocket API 1.0.0 documentation Real-time WebSocket API for multiplayer and solo Boggle gameplay. The WebSocket server shares a port with the HTTP server. All client messages (except the raw connection-ID frame) are JSON. Table of Contents Servers production insecure Operations PUB / SUB / Servers production Server URL: wss://{host} Protocol: wss If the server has an API token configured, include it as a query parameter: wss://host?token= . The token is validated at connection time. boardHistoryCount is the only event that works on unauthenticated connections. URL Variables Name Description Default value Allowed values host Server hostname and optional port (e.g. example.com or localhost:443) None Any insecure Server URL: ws://{host} Protocol: ws Used when SKIP_TLS=1 is set in the server .env URL Variables Name Description Default value Allowed values host Server hostname and optional port None Any Operations PUB / Operation Messages sent FROM the client TO the server Single persistent connection used for all gameplay events. On connect the server immediately sends a raw (non-JSON) hex string that is your socket ID. All subsequent frames in both directions are JSON. ws Channel specific information Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes method - - "GET" - - Accepts one of the following messages: Message Create Room createRoom *Create a new multiplayer room. The socket becomes the room host. Server responds with roomCode. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "createRoom" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.name string Display name for this player - - required Examples of payload basic { "event": "createRoom", "data": { "name": "Alice" } } Message Join Room joinRoom *Join an existing room using the host's room code. On success the server responds with joinSuccess and broadcasts joinNotification to all existing room members. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "joinRoom" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.name string Display name for this player - - required 1.data.roomCode string Code received from the room host - - required Examples of payload basic { "event": "joinRoom", "data": { "name": "Bob", "roomCode": "3fa2" } } Message Leave Room leaveRoom *Leave the current room. The socket is removed from the room and remaining members receive a leaveNotification. If a game has ended but this player had not yet submitted foundWords, they are removed from the expected response count and results may be triggered early. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "leaveRoom" ) - - Examples of payload basic { "event": "leaveRoom" } Message Start Game startGame *Start a game in the current room. Any room member may trigger this. The server generates a board, broadcasts gameStart to all members, then automatically broadcasts gameEnd after GAME_LENGTH seconds. Fails if the socket is not in a room or a game is already in progress. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "startGame" ) - - Examples of payload basic { "event": "startGame" } Message Found Words foundWords *Submit the words found during the game. Must be sent after receiving gameEnd. Once all room members have submitted, the server broadcasts gameResults. Fails if the game is still in progress. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "foundWords" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.words array Words found by this player (case-insensitive; server upper-cases them) - - required 1.data.words (single item) string - - - - Examples of payload basic { "event": "foundWords", "data": { "words": [ "cat", "rate", "tear", "later" ] } } Message Board History Count boardHistoryCount *Request board generation history. Does NOT require an apiToken even when the server has one configured. If the socket has no room assigned, it is placed in the virtual 'homePage' room and will receive automatic pushes of this event whenever new boards are generated via the HTTP API. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "boardHistoryCount" ) - - Examples of payload basic { "event": "boardHistoryCount" } Message Solo Board Request browserPlay_soloBoard *Request a freshly generated and solved board for in-browser solo play. Server responds with a soloBoard event. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "browserPlay_soloBoard" ) - - Examples of payload basic { "event": "browserPlay_soloBoard" } Message Definition Request definition Look up the definition of a word. Server responds with a definition event. Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed event string - - - required data object Event-specific payload (required for some events) - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "definition" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.word string The word to look up - - required Examples of payload basic { "event": "definition", "data": { "word": "boggle" } } SUB / Operation Messages sent FROM the server TO the client Single persistent connection used for all gameplay events. On connect the server immediately sends a raw (non-JSON) hex string that is your socket ID. All subsequent frames in both directions are JSON. ws Channel specific information Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes method - - "GET" - - Accepts one of the following messages: Message Connection ID (raw frame) connectionId *Sent immediately on connection before any JSON frames. The value is a raw 16-character hex string — NOT wrapped in JSON. Store it; it is used as the key in gameResults.responses. * Content type: text/plain Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) string 16-hex-char socket ID (8 random bytes) - pattern ( ^[0-9a-f]{16}$ ) - Examples of payload (generated) "a3f1b2c4d5e6f708" Message Room Code roomCodeResponse Response to createRoom — the newly created room's join code Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "roomCode" ) - - 1.data string Hex room code to share with other players - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "roomCode", "data": "3fa2" } Message Join Success joinSuccessResponse Acknowledgement that joinRoom succeeded; the socket is now in the room Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "joinSuccess" ) - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "joinSuccess", "data": null } Message Join Notification joinNotification *Broadcast to ALL existing members of a room when a new player joins. (The joining player receives joinSuccess instead.) * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "joinNotification" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.name string Display name of the player who just joined - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "joinNotification", "data": { "name": "string" } } Message Leave Success leaveSuccessResponse Acknowledgement that leaveRoom succeeded; the socket is no longer in a room Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "leaveSuccess" ) - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "leaveSuccess", "data": null } Message Leave Notification leaveNotification Broadcast to remaining room members when a player leaves Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "leaveNotification" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.name string Display name of the player who left - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "leaveNotification", "data": { "name": "string" } } Message Game Start gameStart *Broadcast to all room members when a game is started. Contains the full board; clients should start their timers. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameStart" ) - - 1.data object A fully solved 4×4 Boggle board - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.squares array 16 letter tiles in row-major order (index 0 = top-left, 15 = bottom-right). "Qu" is a possible tile value. - 16 items - 1.data.squares (single item) string - - - - 1.data.words array Every valid word findable on this board (lower-case, sorted) - - - 1.data.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.inProgress boolean True while the game timer is running - - - 1.data.duration integer Game length in seconds (controlled by GAME_LENGTH env var) - - - 1.data.expectedResponseCount integer Number of players from whom the server is expecting foundWords - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameStart", "data": { "squares": [ "A", "E", "T", "S", "R", "I", "N", "O", "L", "D", "U", "H", "G", "W", "E", "N" ], "words": [ "string" ], "inProgress": true, "duration": 0, "expectedResponseCount": 0 } } Message Game End gameEnd *Broadcast to all room members when the server-side timer expires. Players should submit their foundWords after receiving this. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameEnd" ) - - 1.data string - - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameEnd", "data": "Clock ran out" } Message Game Results gameResults *Broadcast to all room members once every player has submitted foundWords. Contains full scoring details. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameResults" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.winners array Socket IDs of the player(s) with the highest score. Use the connection ID received on connect to identify yourself. - - - 1.data.winners (single item) string - - - - 1.data.unfoundWords array Words on the board that no player submitted - - - 1.data.unfoundWords (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses object Map of socketId → scored player result - - - 1.data.responses (additional properties) object One player's scored result after a game - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.responses.name string Display name of the player - - - 1.data.responses.words array All words submitted by this player (upper-cased, sorted) - - - 1.data.responses.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses.uniqueWords array Words found only by this player (used for scoring) - - - 1.data.responses.uniqueWords (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses.score integer Points earned from unique words only. 3-4 letter words = 1pt, 5 = 2pt, 6 = 3pt, 7+ = 11pt. - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameResults", "data": { "winners": [ "string" ], "unfoundWords": [ "string" ], "responses": { "property1": { "name": "string", "words": [ "string" ], "uniqueWords": [ "string" ], "score": 0 }, "property2": { "name": "string", "words": [ "string" ], "uniqueWords": [ "string" ], "score": 0 } } } } Message Board History Count boardHistoryCountResponse *Response to boardHistoryCount. Also pushed automatically to any socket whose roomCode is 'homePage' whenever new boards are generated. * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "boardHistoryCount" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.history array Board generation history records from the SQLite database - - - 1.data.history.timestamp string - - format ( date-time ) - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "boardHistoryCount", "data": { "history": [ { "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z" } ] } } Message Solo Board soloBoardResponse Response to browserPlay_soloBoard — a fresh board for in-browser solo play Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "soloBoard" ) - - 1.data object A fully solved 4×4 Boggle board - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.squares array 16 letter tiles in row-major order (index 0 = top-left, 15 = bottom-right). "Qu" is a possible tile value. - 16 items - 1.data.squares (single item) string - - - - 1.data.words array Every valid word findable on this board (lower-case, sorted) - - - 1.data.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.inProgress boolean True while the game timer is running - - - 1.data.duration integer Game length in seconds (controlled by GAME_LENGTH env var) - - - 1.data.expectedResponseCount integer Number of players from whom the server is expecting foundWords - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "soloBoard", "data": { "squares": [ "A", "E", "T", "S", "R", "I", "N", "O", "L", "D", "U", "H", "G", "W", "E", "N" ], "words": [ "string" ], "inProgress": true, "duration": 0, "expectedResponseCount": 0 } } Message Definition definitionResponse Response to a definition request Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "definition" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.word string - - - - 1.data.definition string Present on success - - - 1.data.error string Present when lookup failed - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "definition", "data": { "word": "string", "definition": "string", "error": "string" } } Message Error errorResponse *Returned whenever a message fails JSON parsing, schema validation, API token checking, or business-logic rules (e.g. wrong room state). * Payload Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.status string - allowed ( "error" ) - - 1.event string - allowed ( "error" ) - - 1.data any Error details. Either a plain string or an AJV error array when the message failed JSON Schema validation. - - additional properties are allowed Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "error", "event": "error", "data": null }

docs.text: Real-time WebSocket API for multiplayer and solo Boggle gameplay. The WebSocket server shares a port with the HTTP server. All client messages (except the raw connection-ID frame) are JSON.

docs.text: *Broadcast to all room members when a game is started. Contains the full board; clients should start their timers. *
docs.title: Message Game Start gameStart

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameStart" ) - - 1.data object A fully solved 4×4 Boggle board - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.squares array 16 letter tiles in row-major order (index 0 = top-left, 15 = bottom-right). "Qu" is a possible tile value. - 16 items - 1.data.squares (single item) string - - - - 1.data.words array Every valid word findable on this board (lower-case, sorted) - - - 1.data.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.inProgress boolean True while the game timer is running - - - 1.data.duration integer Game length in seconds (controlled by GAME_LENGTH env var) - - - 1.data.expectedResponseCount integer Number of players from whom the server is expecting foundWords - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameStart", "data": { "squares": [ "A", "E", "T", "S", "R", "I", "N", "O", "L", "D", "U", "H", "G", "W", "E", "N" ], "words": [ "string" ], "inProgress": true, "duration": 0, "expectedResponseCount": 0 } }
docs.title: Payload

docs.text: *Broadcast to all room members when the server-side timer expires. Players should submit their foundWords after receiving this. *
docs.title: Message Game End gameEnd

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameEnd" ) - - 1.data string - - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameEnd", "data": "Clock ran out" }
docs.title: Payload

docs.text: *Broadcast to all room members once every player has submitted foundWords. Contains full scoring details. *
docs.title: Message Game Results gameResults

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "gameResults" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.winners array Socket IDs of the player(s) with the highest score. Use the connection ID received on connect to identify yourself. - - - 1.data.winners (single item) string - - - - 1.data.unfoundWords array Words on the board that no player submitted - - - 1.data.unfoundWords (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses object Map of socketId → scored player result - - - 1.data.responses (additional properties) object One player's scored result after a game - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.responses.name string Display name of the player - - - 1.data.responses.words array All words submitted by this player (upper-cased, sorted) - - - 1.data.responses.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses.uniqueWords array Words found only by this player (used for scoring) - - - 1.data.responses.uniqueWords (single item) string - - - - 1.data.responses.score integer Points earned from unique words only. 3-4 letter words = 1pt, 5 = 2pt, 6 = 3pt, 7+ = 11pt. - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "gameResults", "data": { "winners": [ "string" ], "unfoundWords": [ "string" ], "responses": { "property1": { "name": "string", "words": [ "string" ], "uniqueWords": [ "string" ], "score": 0 }, "property2": { "name": "string", "words": [ "string" ], "uniqueWords": [ "string" ], "score": 0 } } } }
docs.title: Payload

docs.text: *Response to boardHistoryCount. Also pushed automatically to any socket whose roomCode is 'homePage' whenever new boards are generated. *
docs.title: Message Board History Count boardHistoryCountResponse

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "boardHistoryCount" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.history array Board generation history records from the SQLite database - - - 1.data.history.timestamp string - - format ( date-time ) - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "boardHistoryCount", "data": { "history": [ { "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z" } ] } }
docs.title: Payload

docs.text: Response to browserPlay_soloBoard — a fresh board for in-browser solo play
docs.title: Message Solo Board soloBoardResponse

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "soloBoard" ) - - 1.data object A fully solved 4×4 Boggle board - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.squares array 16 letter tiles in row-major order (index 0 = top-left, 15 = bottom-right). "Qu" is a possible tile value. - 16 items - 1.data.squares (single item) string - - - - 1.data.words array Every valid word findable on this board (lower-case, sorted) - - - 1.data.words (single item) string - - - - 1.data.inProgress boolean True while the game timer is running - - - 1.data.duration integer Game length in seconds (controlled by GAME_LENGTH env var) - - - 1.data.expectedResponseCount integer Number of players from whom the server is expecting foundWords - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "soloBoard", "data": { "squares": [ "A", "E", "T", "S", "R", "I", "N", "O", "L", "D", "U", "H", "G", "W", "E", "N" ], "words": [ "string" ], "inProgress": true, "duration": 0, "expectedResponseCount": 0 } }

docs.text: Response to a definition request
docs.title: Message Definition definitionResponse

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.event string - allowed ( "definition" ) - - 1.data object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.data.word string - - - - 1.data.definition string Present on success - - - 1.data.error string Present when lookup failed - - - Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "ok", "event": "definition", "data": { "word": "string", "definition": "string", "error": "string" } }

docs.text: *Returned whenever a message fails JSON parsing, schema validation, API token checking, or business-logic rules (e.g. wrong room state). *
docs.title: Message Error errorResponse

docs.text: Name Type Description Value Constraints Notes (root) allOf - - - additional properties are allowed 0 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed status string - allowed ( "ok" , "error" ) - required event string - - - required data any Event-specific payload - - additional properties are allowed 1 (allOf item) object - - - additional properties are allowed 1.status string - allowed ( "error" ) - - 1.event string - allowed ( "error" ) - - 1.data any Error details. Either a plain string or an AJV error array when the message failed JSON Schema validation. - - additional properties are allowed Examples of payload (generated) { "status": "error", "event": "error", "data": null }
docs.title: Payload
